column1: # HPRC Release 2 diploid assemblies — sample manifest for the Mode B benchmark.
# Columns: sample_id, hap1_url, hap2_url, population, super_population
# Assembly URLs are s3:// or https:// URIs; https is convenient for curl/aws s3 cp --no-sign-request.
# The canonical, maintained sample/assembly manifest for HPRC R2 is tracked at
# The `release_2/assembly_index.txt` there maps HGxxx → per-haplotype FASTA path on S3.
# This file ships a curated subset of ~20 samples selected for multi-population
# coverage (5 AFR + 5 AMR + 5 EAS + 5 EUR). To run at full HPRC R2 scale,
# replace this with the full R2 manifest (200+ rows) generated via
# NOTE: The URLs below are templates. Before a live run, refresh from the canonical
